features: provides effective protection against perspiration for 72 hours
description: Adidas - The real sports brand for men and women, offering the best and most complete personal care line to be at your best, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Whether you love or practice sport, adidas body care lets you take full advantage of your potential. Be ready. In order to provide you with state-of-the-art personal care solutions that meet all your expectations and needs Adidas Fresh Endurance antiperspirant absorbs sweat and neutralises odours in the best way, making you feel fresh and clean every day. Characteristics: provides effective protection against perspiration for 72 hours protects against unpleasant odours for 72 hours leaves a long-term feeling of freshness for 72 hours How to use: Apply to clean, dry skin under the arms.

specifications_table.Special Features: 6 x 150ml each, 72hour anti-perspirant, Body Response Tech Heat Activated Anti Perspirant
